General.Name: Golden Wheel Tiandi Holdings Co Ltd
General.Description: Golden Wheel Tiandi Holdings Company Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the development of commercial and residential properties in Mainland China and Hong Kong. It operates through three segments: Property Development, Property Leasing, and Hotel Operation. The company develops and sells properties; and offers property leasing services, including the lease of self-owned properties and sub-lease of rented properties, as well as operates hotels. It also develops and operates shopping malls; and provides metro leasing and operational management, and property decoration services. The company was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Nanjing, China.
General.Address: Golden Wheel International Plaza, Nanjing, China
